title: TruthCert Denominator-First Engine
description: Zenodo release metadata for the TruthCert Denominator-First Engine software package stored under C:/Models/truthcert-denominator-phase1. Mint the DOI from the next public GitHub release and then update the F1000 software-availability section to cite the resulting archive record.
notes: Prepared locally to reduce DOI-minting friction for the F1000 submission bundle.
